evidence_ledger.snippet: > **Enterprise-grade biomedical research behind a chat interface** - Access PubMed, clinical trials, FDA drug labels, and run complex Python analyses through natural language. P...
Traditional biomedical research and data is fragmented across dozens of databases and platforms. Bio changes everything by providing:
- **Comprehensive Medical Data** - PubMed articles, ClinicalTrials.gov data, FDA drug labels, and more
- **Interactive Visualizations** - Beautiful charts and dashboards for clinical data
- **Real-Time Intelligence** - Web search integration for breaking medical news
- **Clinical Trials Database** - Search ClinicalTrials.gov for active and completed trials
- **Interactive Charts** - Visualize clinical data, drug efficacy, patient outcomes
- **Interactive Charts** - Visualize clinical data, drug efficacy, patient outcomes
- **Interactive Charts** - Create publication-ready visualizations of clinical data
Self-hosted mode is the recommended way to run Bio. It provides a complete local environment with:
- That's it! Bio will automatically detect and use it
Try these powerful queries to see what Bio can do:
- "What are the latest clinical trials for CAR-T therapy in melanoma?"
- "Analyze Phase 3 clinical trial data for immunotherapy drugs"
- Keep all your medical research completely private
- Perfect for sensitive patient data analysis
The quickest way to get Bio running in production:
- No storage of sensitive medical data
For bugs or feature requests, [open an issue](https://github.com/yorkeccak/bio/issues) or start a [discussion](https://github.com/yorkeccak/bio/discussions).
For bugs or feature requests, [open an issue](https://github.com/yorkeccak/bio/issues) or start a [discussion](https://github.com/yorkeccak/bio/discussions).

method: Deterministic local CLI scan. No LLM, network, or runtime test execution is required.

measurement_basis.stage_1: README/package bio-domain regex; hype-claim penalties; limitation, strong regulatory-framework signals, weaker self-asserted compliance signals, disclaimer, demographic-bias, and reproducibility responsibility signals
measurement_basis.stage_2r: Repo-local consistency checks across README, package metadata, docs, changelog, test/CI files, and deterministic contradiction/staleness/workflow-support heuristics
measurement_basis.stage_3_T3: CHANGELOG.md, CHANGELOG, or NEWS.md file exists; max credit requires bug-fix, patch, or security entries
measurement_basis.stage_3_B1: requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, or environment.yml file exists; max credit requires data-source, dataset-citation, or IRB language
measurement_basis.stage_3_B2: bias/limitation vocabulary present in README and docs; max credit requires quantitative measurement evidence or related test coverage
measurement_basis.stage_3_B3: funding/sponsor/COI vocabulary present in README, docs, or FUNDING.md (regex)
measurement_basis.stage_4: Deterministic replication evidence lane: containers, reproducibility targets, lock/pin/hash evidence, README reproducibility sections, dataset/model artifact references, citation metadata, license/use-scope restriction evidence, CLI/seed/example signals
measurement_basis.ca_severity: Clinical/diagnostic term regex match in README, docs, and package metadata
measurement_basis.ca_taxonomy_governance: ca-taxonomy-v1 from runtime_regex_hardcoded_in_scanner_py; reference markdown is informative, not authoritative runtime source.
measurement_basis.C1: Hardcoded key pattern regex (AWS AKIA*, sk-*, ghp_*, api_key=[REDACTED], excluding obvious placeholder/test values and test/example fixture contexts
measurement_basis.C2: Dependency-manifest-only pin check across requirements/environment/setup.cfg/pyproject dependency sections; ignores non-dependency metadata lines
measurement_basis.C3: Patient metadata patterns in deprecated/legacy/archive directories (regex)
measurement_basis.C4: AST-backed detection of executable fail-open Python exception handlers (except/pass or except/return True)
measurement_basis.CC1: AST scan for public functions with confidence/threshold parameter defaulting to 0 or 0.0.
measurement_basis.CC2: README code-block import names compared against package __all__; flags names claimed as importable but absent.
measurement_basis.CC3: AST scan for validate_*/check_* functions using len() but no re.match/search structure check.
measurement_basis.airi_risk_coverage: MIT AI Risk Repository V4_03 (airisk.mit.edu, arXiv:2408.12622) local-governed mapping: detectors cross-referenced to AIRI risk IDs through a full local registry, curated runtime bundle, and detector-mapping registry.
measurement_basis.BIO-Diagnostics: Deterministic evidence-only bio diagnostics: conservative SMILES surface checks, SMILES parser-guard checks, silent mock fallback detection, traceability manifest surface checks, and subprocess bio-tool run-trace heuristics.
measurement_basis.REG-Scaffolding: Evidence-only traceability scaffolding signals from manifest/hash/audit-log schema surfaces; intended as structural audit-readiness support rather than compliance proof.
measurement_basis.score_cap: Score ceiling applied when clinical-adjacent signals lack explicit disclaimer

note.title: Regulatory basis note
note.body_line_1: Aligned to current official source classes as of May 2026: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689), FDA QMSR, FDA AI-enabled device guidance themes, and IMDRF SaMD/GMLP frameworks.
note.body_line_2: This is a traceability aid, not a compliance or clearance determination.

stage_1.note: Boundary, intended-use, and limitation language is relevant to transparency scaffolding only.
Legal or compliance claims without supporting governance evidence are relevant to transparency and quality-system review, not compliance proof.

stage_2r.note: Repository-local contradiction and boundary signals are relevant to clinical-context traceability, not clinical validation.

stage_3.note: Provenance and bias signals are relevant to data-governance review, but do not verify execution quality.

stage_4.note: Reproducibility and trace manifests support record-keeping scaffolding, not operational logging completeness.

regulatory_traceability.summary: Structural signals partially align with traceability scaffolding. This remains a pre-audit traceability aid, not a compliance determination.
